name: Chocolate Pecan Pie (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry for an unbaked one-crust pie.
2. Heat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a large bowl, combine corn syrup, sugar, melted butter or margarine, vanilla, and eggs; beat well.
4. Reserve 2 tablespoons of chocolate chips for topping.
5. Stir in the remaining chocolate chips and 1-1/2 cups of pecans. Spread evenly in pastry-lined pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 to 65 minutes or until deep golden brown and filling is set. Cool completely.
7. Line a cookie sheet with waxed paper.
8. Melt 2 tablespoons of reserved chocolate chips in a small saucepan over low heat.
9. Dip each of the 10 pecan halves into chocolate. Place on paper-lined cookie sheet.
10. Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes or until chocolate is set.
11. Garnish pie with whipped cream and chocolate-dipped nuts. Store in refrigerator.
